kirundi.pick_a_destination_get_8_17_turns_to_s: Hitamo aho ugiye. Ubona uruziga 8-17 kugira ngo urokoke ingaruka zayo mu gihe ukusanya siyansi. Buri ruziga ushyiraho igabana ry'ingufu, urohereza, ibintu byakozwe na AI biratangira, kandi uhitamo uburyo abakozi bawe bazasubiza. Gutsinda = kurokoka inzira zose. Gutsindwa = O₂ cyangwa ubwato bugera kuri zeru.
kirundi.engineer_medic_scientist_etc_unlock_a_: (injeniyeri, umuganga, umuhanga mu bya siyansi, n'ibindi) bafungura amahitamo ya 4 ahishe igihe ibintu bihuye n'ubuhanga bwabo. Kanda umukozi mu gihe cy'ibintu kugira ngo ugishe inama.
kirundi.opens_once_you_have_50_science_permane: rifungura iyo ufite siyansi 50+. Kuvugurura guhoraho kugabanya ikoreshwa ry'ibikoresho cyangwa gufungura amahitamo mashya.
kirundi.life_science_shields_comms_lets_you_bi: (Ubuzima / Siyansi / Ingabo / Itumanaho) bigufasha kunamya ikoreshwa ry'ibikoresho buri ruziga. Icyemezo mbere yo kohereza.
kirundi.tip_harder_destinations_give_more_scie: Inama: aho ugiye hagoye hatanga siyansi nyinshi. Mars n'Ukwezi ni ahantu ho gutangirira hizewe cyane. Intsinzi, % nziza n'igiteranyo cya siyansi bikurikiranwa ku rugendo munsi ya buri kabuto.
kirundi.roguelike_missions_across_the_solar_sy: Ubutumwa bwa roguelike mu izuba ryacu. Buri gikino kigisha siyansi nshya.
kirundi.each_pip_reduces_o_drain_by_1: Buri ngingo igabanya ikoreshwa rya O₂ na 1.
kirundi.each_pip_adds_1_science_at_event_resol: Buri ngingo yongeraho +1 siyansi mu gihe cyo gukemura ibintu.
kirundi.each_pip_mitigates_1_point_of_hull_dam: Buri ngingo igabanya ingingo 1 y'ibyangiritse ku bwato.
kirundi.3_pips_waives_wrong_specialty_consult_: Ingingo 3+ zikuraho igihano cyo kugisha inama ubuhanga butari bwo.
kirundi.consult_a_specialist_about_this_event: Gisha inama umuhanga ku byerekeye iki kintu
kirundi.choose_your_response_press_1_2_or_3_to: Hitamo igisubizo cyawe. Kanda 1, 2, cyangwa 3 guhitamo.
kirundi.spacecraft_orbits_indefinitely_mission: Icyogajuru kizenguruka igihe kitazwi. Ubutumwa burashoboka.
kirundi.eccentricity_too_high_leaves_system: Eccentricity iri hejuru cyane — isiga sisitemu.
kirundi.adjust_sma_eccentricity_drag_widget_sh: Hindura SMA, eccentricity, gukurura. Widget yerekana ibisubizo 4 bitandukanye by'uruziga. Nta manota, nta guhishura.
kirundi.hypothesis_what_combination_produces_e: Igitekerezo: ni iyihe nguni itanga guhunga?
kirundi.find_two_stable_orbits_with_very_diffe: Shaka inziga ebyiri zihamye zifite SMA itandukanye cyane.
kirundi.why_does_increasing_eccentricity_at_hi: Kuki kongera eccentricity kuri SMA iri hejuru bitera guhunga ariko ntibitere kugongana?
kirundi.explain_how_sma_eccentricity_and_drag_: Sobanura uburyo SMA, eccentricity na gukurura bigena hamwe iherezo ry'uruziga.
kirundi.design_note_discrete_4_state_orbital_m: Inyandiko y'igishushanyo: ikimenyetso cy'uruziga gitandukanye cy'imimerere 4; nta manota y'ubushobozi bwa lisansi; nta guhishura — ku bushake.
